Title: DROP LOADER
Description: Remove a specific user-defined loader function. If multiple loader functions exist with the same name, supply the full signature.
Note : This command is MonetDB specific.
See also: DROP ALL LOADER , CREATE LOADER , CREATE FUNCTION LANGUAGE .
Associated system table: sys.functions where type = 7 and language > 2.
Examples:
DROP LOADER [ FUNCTION ] [ IF EXISTS ] [
schema_name
'.' ]
function_name
[ '(' [
arg1_type
[ ,
arg2_type
] [, ... ] ] ')' ]
    [ RESTRICT | CASCADE ]
